pageSubTitle: Create, edit, and remove your Views. Views allow you to save and share sets of filters for reuse when browsing DataHub.
prop.columnGlossaryTermDesc: Glossary terms applied to a schema field / column.

prop.columnTagDesc: Tags applied to a schema field / column.
prop.dataProductDesc: The data product the asset belongs to.
prop.environmentDesc: The environment / origin of the asset (e.g. PROD, DEV).
prop.hasActiveIncidentsDesc: Whether the asset has active incidents.
prop.hasDescriptionDesc: Whether the asset has a description.
prop.hasFailingAssertionsDesc: Whether the asset has failing data quality assertions.
prop.platformInstanceDesc: The specific platform instance where the asset lives.
prop.softDeletedDesc: Whether the asset has been soft deleted.
prop.subTypeDesc: The sub type of the asset (e.g. Table, View, Topic).
